title: Reject compile profiles missing compile_targets
body:
## Summary
- add compile target presence validation for `ap compile`
- cover missing `compile_targets` with a CLI-level regression test

## Test
- `uv run --project agent-profile pytest agent-profile/tests/test_compile_target_presence.py`

expanded scope: agent-profile/agent_profile/cli.py — required to route `ap compile <profile>` through the validation before compilation
